Hello world. This is a basic dictation test. This sentence has a ,, a ., a ?, and an !. (hello, world) "yes" 'yes yes yes' "this should be wrapped in double quotes" 'short phrase' The price is $25.99. The meeting is at 03:30 P.M on Friday. I have 123 apples and 4500 oranges.
